data.name: Village of Love
data.detailed_description:
You are an old man. You have a pickaxe. In front of you - large colorful stones.

Inside the stones - diamonds. And diamonds, as everyone knows, can solve a lot.

This is a calm, fairy-tale first-person simulator about the simple joys of life.

Explore different locations - from simple areas to levels with obstacles - and return to the village to spend what you’ve earned with pleasure.

The village and its inhabitants

In the village, unusual characters await you, ready to trade diamonds for attention, warmth, and love:

  • a mysterious snake woman,

  • a playful cat woman,

  • a cold and confident lizard woman.

Each of them reacts to the hero in her own way and values certain diamonds.

When there are no diamonds

It happens. In such moments, the old man returns home, relaxes, and spends time with his rubber companion, who:

  • asks no questions,

  • is always nearby,

  • and fully shares the philosophy of a calm life.

Also waiting for you in the village:

A merchant cat who, for some reason, accepts mice as payment. He sells boots that make the old man faster than he ever expected,

and pickaxes that break stones more eagerly.

Locations and gameplay

The player will explore different mining areas - calm and simple ones, as well as locations with obstacles, where there’s no need to rush, only to enjoy the process.

Calm music, no races, no stress - just stones, a pickaxe, and the pleasant feeling that everything is going as it should.

Upgrades and progression

Pickaxes - from iron to gold, breaking stones faster and faster.

Boots - increase movement speed and comfort.

Merchant cat - sells upgrades for mice.

Diamonds - the key to progress and intimacy.

Features

  • Mining diamonds from huge colorful stones

  • The main hero - a charismatic old man

  • A merchant cat and unusual village residents

  • Many animated sexual scenes

  • Upgrades for movement speed and tools

  • A cozy, relaxing atmosphere

  • Different locations - from simple areas to levels with obstacles

  • Single-player gameplay without rush or stress

data.short_description: A relaxing first-person simulator about an old man, a pickaxe, and diamonds. Break stones, upgrade your gear, and trade precious gems for love in a fairy-tale village for adults.
data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 德文, 簡體中文, 韓文, 俄文, 瑞典文, 日文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 SP1 / 8.1 / 10 / 11 (64-bit)
  • 處理器: Intel® Core™ i3-4330 / AMD Ryzen™ 3 1200 or higher
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA® GeForce® GTX 750 Ti or higher
  • DirectX: 版本：12
  • 儲存空間: 1500 MB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectSound (DirectX® 9.0c)
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 / 11 (64-bit)
  • 處理器: Intel® Core™ i3-4330 / AMD Ryzen™ 3 1200 or higher
  • 記憶體: 6 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA® GeForce® GTX 750 Ti or higher
  • DirectX: 版本：12
  • 儲存空間: 1500 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectSound (DirectX® 9.0c)
